raw_title: Adnan Zaylani Mohamad Zahid: Opening remarks - Financing Sectoral Engagements (FSE) inaugural session
raw_content: Opening remarks by Mr Adnan Zaylani Mohamad Zahid, Deputy Governor of the Central Bank of Malaysia (Bank Negara Malaysia), at the Financing Sectoral Engagements (FSE) inaugural session, Kuala Lumpur, 6 March 2026.
